item.title: Go container 包用法示例
item.description:
5 container #

package container provides 3 common data structures, list, ring, heap.

list, is a doublely linked list implemention, it can be used as singlely/doublely linked list, stack and queue. ring, is a circular doublely linked list, it can be used as list. heap, is a minimum heap implemention, but if we change the meaning of Interface.Less(i,j int) to LargerThan(i,j int), then we can build a maximum heap.

5.1 list #

how to use it as stack?
